race.description: Devils To Diehards Shoreline Classic Qtis Handicap (Bm55)
race.comment: CRYPT DE PIN (7) was leading on the turn and fought on to finish third over 1100m at this track at her latest appearance. Can challenge. RUM DIARY (4) was a winner over 1100m at this track last time out, dropping out early before coming home with a powerful run to score by 0.7 lengths. Has a decent record at this track. Sure to go well. REVITUP CHARLIE (8) ran a nice race last time out, finishing third and beaten only 1.5 lengths over 1000m at Gold Coast. Has the class to find the winners' list. GRAND CRUSADER (2) finished third last start over 1200m at Esk, beaten 1.5 lengths. Will be rock-hard fit. Placed to advantage so expect another forward showing.
